summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT NumberPlane with a right triangle from origin to (4,3) — GREEN x-leg, RED y-leg, WHITE hypotenuse with sqrt(x²+y²) rotated label. RIGHT column a stack of three MathTex formulas built by TransformFromCopy chaining: ||v|| = sqrt(x²+y²) → sqrt(x²+y²+z²) → sqrt(x_1² + x_2² + ... + x_n²), boxed in YELLOW SurroundingRectangle with caption 'Definition of length in any R^n'.
